meaning: n.爱好,嗜好,趣味,由衷的高兴
examples: Hers was a minor part, but she played it with gusto.
On a visit to an insect farm, she greedily peels the wings and legs off a freeze-dried locust and crunches down with gusto.
She tucked in, with gusto, when food was on offer at a farmer's market.
It offers the slugging gusto of professional wrestling as its appeal to young males.
